description: This file defines a TypeScript class 'UsagePlans' that manages AWS API Gateway usage plans, including different tiers and associated API keys, for a serverless SaaS application.

classes.name: UsagePlans
classes.description: A class extending Construct that manages multiple API Gateway usage plans with different tiers and configurations.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes usage plans based on deployment type, creating different tiers with specific quotas and throttling limits.
